whyCandidateMatters: Cairo Aqueduct would broaden the project beyond the current 41-record set and improve district, type, or period coverage. Coverage value: this record would expand the Ayyubid–Mamluk layer in Fustat to Citadel through a water infrastructure rather than duplicating an existing published monument.
